title: Redirect HTTP to HTTPS with Middleware
description:
## Redirect HTTP to HTTPS with Middleware

A common production pattern is to enforce HTTPS by permanently redirecting all HTTP traffic. Traefik's `RedirectScheme` middleware handles this at the proxy layer — no application code changes required.

**Your task:**

In the `traefik-lab` namespace:
1. Create a `Middleware` named `redirect-to-https` using `RedirectScheme` configured to redirect to `https` with a **permanent** redirect (301).
2. Create an `IngressRoute` named `http-catch-all` on the `web` EntryPoint that matches `HostRegexp(\`{host:.+}\`)` and applies the `redirect-to-https` middleware. The `services` list should be empty (redirects do not need a backend).

```bash
# Verify middleware:
kubectl get middleware redirect-to-https -n traefik-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.redirectScheme.scheme}'
# Verify permanent flag:
kubectl get middleware redirect-to-https -n traefik-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.redirectScheme.permanent}'
```

hints.title: RedirectScheme middleware structure
hints.body: Set spec.redirectScheme.scheme to 'https' and spec.redirectScheme.permanent to true for a 301. A 302 is issued when permanent is false or omitted.
hints.command:
kubectl apply -f - <<EOF
apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: Middleware
metadata:
  name: redirect-to-https
  namespace: traefik-lab
spec:
  redirectScheme:
    scheme: https
    permanent: true
EOF

hints.title: IngressRoute for the catch-all redirect
hints.body: The route that performs the redirect does not need a backend service. Use an empty services list.
hints.command:
kubectl apply -f - <<'EOF'
apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: IngressRoute
metadata:
  name: http-catch-all
  namespace: traefik-lab
spec:
  entryPoints:
  - web
  routes:
  - match: HostRegexp(`{host:.+}`)
    kind: Rule
    middlewares:
    - name: redirect-to-https
    services: []
EOF

validation.description: Check that the redirect middleware and catch-all IngressRoute are correctly configured

commands.command: kubectl get middleware redirect-to-https -n traefik-lab -o jsonpath='{.metadata.name}'
kubectl get middleware redirect-to-https -n traefik-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.redirectScheme.scheme}'
